current_action_id.description: Start execution from a specific action node ID instead of the trigger. Useful for testing mid-workflow actions.

globals.description: Test event data to trigger the workflow with. Object shape matches the trigger payload — typically {event: {...}, person: {...}, groups: {...}}.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this hog flow.

mock_async_functions.description: When true (default), async actions (HTTP requests, emails, SMS) are simulated rather than executed. Set false to actually fire side effects — use with caution.
